closed_debts.title: Drift entre contratos Python y schemas JSON
evidence: backend/test_project_state_schema_contract.py compares schema status enum and optional fields against orchestrator/contracts.py.

closed_debts.title: Frontera de seguridad de validaciones
evidence: orchestrator/validator.py evaluates every validation command with orchestrator.security_policy.decide_command before subprocess execution.
orchestrator/validator.py runs allowed validation commands with shell=False.
orchestrator/validator.py persists validation security decisions in runtime/validation_security_events.jsonl.
backend/test_validator_security.py proves allowed Python validation, shell blocking, unknown-command denial and invalid-command blocking.

commands.command: env PYTHONPATH=backend:. python3 -m unittest backend.test_agent_runtime_habla backend.test_executor_pipe_drain

notes: Git status/diff could not be used because the working directory is not a git repository.
The new validation security log is treated as control-plane/internal evidence and cannot satisfy expected_files.
